creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to James Wright from comment #77)
It's not about just test building and running, but since JetBrains changed a bunch of stuff on us since the last committed update, actually figuring out a maintenance plan with respect to those changes. All of those take additional spare cycles. It is good to know that the -ultimate port has some breakthroughs but they still need to be qualified here.

(maintainer-feedback set solely to inhibit timeout)
